evals.prompt: Write an engineering spec in docs/spec for turning approved PRDs into durable engineering specs. Use parent prd-00001-project-bootstrap-copilot.
evals.expected_output: An initial response that begins the brainstorming-style spec flow: it uses the supplied PRD as parent context, does not draft a spec file yet, and moves through clarification or design-direction options before any spec writing starts.
expectations: The first response does not draft a spec file before the user approves the design.
The response treats the supplied PRD as the required parent context for the new main spec.

evals.prompt: Create a draft engineering spec in docs/spec for a managed skill installer flow. If I did not provide a parent PRD yet, tell me what is missing before drafting.
evals.expected_output: An initial response that refuses to draft without a concrete PRD parent and asks for or helps identify the missing PRD before proceeding.
expectations: The first response does not draft a spec file.
The response states that a main spec requires a concrete PRD parent.
The response asks the user to provide or identify the PRD before it can present options and draft the spec.
The response does not accept <id> or another non-PRD document type as the main spec parent.

evals.prompt: Add a patch spec in docs/spec to spec-00020-agent-session-state that clarifies recovery behavior when the workspace store is stale.
evals.expected_output: A new patch spec saved under docs/spec with parent spec-00020-agent-session-state and concrete body content shaped to the request.
expectations: The run creates exactly one new markdown file under docs/spec.
The new file front matter has type spec, role patch, status draft, and parent spec-00020-agent-session-state.
The new file includes a title and concrete spec content after the title.
The new file contains no unresolved placeholder lines.
